Available filters: status (draft/published), start_date, end_date.
Supports pagination via page and page_size.

parameters.description: Start of the date range to filter posts. Format: yyyy-MM-dd

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range to filter posts. Format: yyyy-MM-dd

post.description:
Create a new post.
Status and visibility are required.
Set notify_members to true to send push notifications to members — only takes effect when status is set to published.

created_on.description: The date and time when this record was created in the database. THIS IS NOT THE ACTUAL PAYMENT DATE..

paid_on.description: The actual date when the payment was made.

move_to_fund_id.description: The fund ID to move contributions to. Required only if the fund has contributions.

move_to_payment_method_id.description: The payment method ID to move contributions to. Required only if the payment method has contributions.

interval.description: Repeat every N periods (e.g. 2 = every 2 weeks).

weekly.description: Populated only when frequency is weekly.

monthly.description: Populated only when frequency is monthly.

yearly.description: Populated only when frequency is yearly.

end_date.description: Date the series ends (YYYY-MM-DD). null means the series repeats indefinitely.

start_time.description:
Time of day the event starts, in HH:mm:ss 24-hour format (local church time).
null when all_day is true — all-day events have no defined start time.
For recurring events this time is reused on every occurrence in the series.

end_time.description:
Time of day the event ends, in HH:mm:ss 24-hour format (local church time).
null when all_day is true — all-day events have no defined end time.
For recurring events this time is reused on every occurrence in the series.

duration_days.description:
Number of additional calendar days the event spans beyond its start date.
0 = the event starts and ends on the same calendar day.
1 = the event ends on the next calendar day (e.g. starts 23:00, ends 01:00).
Use start_date + duration_days to derive the end date of any occurrence.

by_month_day.description: Fixed day of the month (1–31). Populated when `type` is `by_date`.

oneOf.description: Ordinal position of the weekday within the month (e.g. `first`, `last`). Populated when `type` is `by_day_position`.
Day of the week. Populated when `type` is `by_day_position`.

occurrence_id.description:
Unique identifier for this occurrence. Use this value as-is when calling occurrence endpoints.
The format depends on the materialized field:
  true  — a numeric string representing the schedule record ID in the database (e.g. "12345").
  false — a generated string, as no database record exists for this virtual occurrence.

start.description: Start datetime of the occurrence in local church time. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss

end.description: End datetime of the occurrence in local church time. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss

materialized.description:
True when a real record exists.
False when computed on-the-fly from the recurrence rule.

is_main.description: True if this is the person's primary organization. Diocese accounts only.

RecurrenceRuleType.description: Discriminator for monthly / yearly recurrence sub-rules.

is_default.description: Whether this fund should be set as the default fund. If true, any existing default fund will be unset. If this fund is default, cannot be false

by_week_days.description: Days of the week on which the event repeats. Contains at least one value.

by_month.description: Month of the year (1–12). Always populated.

by_month_day.description: Fixed day of the month (1–31). Populated when type is by_date.

oneOf.description: Ordinal position of the weekday within the month (e.g. first, last). Populated when type is by_set_position.
Day of the week. Populated when type is by_set_position.

ApiKey.description: Provide your API key in the 'apikey' header.
ApiKey.name: apikey
